preregistration.targetDefinition: Next recorded MENA composite threat-index level.
preregistration.resolutionRule: Resolve each stored one-step point forecast against the next actual value recorded in data/forecast_eval.jsonl.
preregistration.method: Rolling-origin evaluation in timestamp order with issue-time cutoff enforcement and no shuffled observations.
preregistration.confidenceInterval: Paired bootstrap 95% confidence interval over model-minus-baseline absolute-error differences.
exclusions: Rows missing a finite actual, model prediction, naïve prediction, or timestamp.

Legacy forecast rows whose stored point cannot be matched exactly to the immediately preceding history record are excluded from governed forecast-record migration but retained in aggregate evaluation.
preregistration.missingDataHandling: No imputation and no timestamp interpolation.
